title: phalangium hirsutum
intro: Phalangium hirsutum, also known as Hairy Spider Orchid, is a species of orchid native to Australia. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Phalangium hirsutum include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and potentially alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
